changes: The description for the PvE action Barrage listed the incorrect potency for Shadowbite. This was a text-only issue; the potency of the action remains unchanged.
Resolved an issue wherein an action that cannot be executed or set to the hotbar appeared in the Actions & Traits window.

new_content.name: Cosmic Exploration
new_content.description: Large-scale gameplay for Disciples of the Hand and Land where players work together to explore uncharted cosmic terrain, establish base camps, and complete missions.

new_content.name: Cosmic Tools
new_content.description: A system for class-specific tools for Disciples of the Hand and Land that can be enhanced through research data obtained in Cosmic Exploration.

new_content.name: Sinus Ardorum
new_content.description: Exploration zone located on the Source's moon, serving as the hub for Cosmic Exploration.

new_content.name: Mech Ops
new_content.description: Large-scale directives in Sinus Ardorum where players participate as pilots or ground support to complete objectives.

new_content.name: Cosmic Exploration Projects
new_content.description: Large-scale milestones in Cosmic Exploration that change the field and trigger FATE-style collaborative events.

housing.name: Stellar Lamppost
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing. Though this piece of illuminating infrastructure has been specially designed to function in the icy vacuum of space, it is still not rated for licking.

housing.name: Cosmochair
housing.description: Furnishing. An interstellar travel-ready seat with a futuristic─yet still appropriately leporine─design.

housing.name: Drafting Table
housing.description: Furnishing. A slanted desk suited for drawing up engineering designs.

housing.name: Cosmotable
housing.description: Table. This furnishing is designed to minimize the possibility of spills in low-gravity environments. Unfortunately, technology capable of compensating entirely for Loporrit error remains far in the future.

housing.name: Cosmolamp
housing.description: Tabletop. An energy-efficient lighting appliance with a design reminiscent of a solar system.

glamour.name: Star Crew Jacket
glamour.description: Body piece of the star crew set.

glamour.name: Star Crew Gloves
glamour.description: Hands piece of the star crew set.

glamour.name: Star Crew Trousers
glamour.description: Legs piece of the star crew set.

glamour.name: Star Crew Boots
glamour.description: Feet piece of the star crew set.

glamour.name: Cosmosuit Coffer
glamour.description: A banded chest containing a complete cosmosuit.
